title: Turkish-Style Scamorza Wrap
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Turkish-inspired wrap filled with melted scamorza cheese, cozy spices, and fresh herbs.

ingredients.name: Cozy spice blend
ingredients.notes: A mix of cumin, paprika, and coriander

instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium heat.
2. Slice the scamorza cheese into thin pieces.
3. Mix the cozy spice blend, salt, and black pepper in a small bowl.
4. Brush the Turkish wrap lightly with the spice blend mixture.
5. Grill the wrap for 1-2 minutes on each side, until slightly charred.
6. Assemble the wrap by spreading garlic on the wrap, followed by the sliced scamorza cheese.
7. Sprinkle chopped parsley on top of the cheese.
8. Fold the wrap in half to enclose the filling.
